notes: Though I rate this games platinum, and while it plays really nice on all of my systems (this being my main rig), there are two minor cosmetic nuances: It may be related to driver or some such, but you cannot enable shadows and water reflections, no matter what you do. You can set Depth and Bloom, and sometimes fiddling with these settings will yield reset to minimum quality settings. I just tried to run the game through regular wine, and it crashes, for some reason (4.5-staging)
title: Sherlock Holmes versus Jack the Ripper

notes:
Game runs great, and on highest graphics settings, no tweaks required.  Just install and play.

Few minor issues that I've come across, but not sure if they're related to Linux / Proton or would also happen on Windows...

Game has exited back to desktop twice (in 5+ hrs).  Recommend you save often.
For some reason you can't save in certain places at certain times.  Slightly annoying, but generally means you just have to enter/leave from where you are and you can save again.
Enabling anti-aliasing causes the game to become incredibly slow for me (but with everything else on max the game runs great).
title: Sherlock Holmes versus Jack the Ripper
